title: triticum dicoccum subsp. volgense
intro: Triticum dicoccum subsp. volgense, also known as Volga emmer wheat, is a subspecies of emmer wheat, a type of ancient grain that belongs to the wheat family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Triticum dicoccum subsp. volgense include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also sometimes used as a dietary supplement to promote overall well-being.
